title: draba aurea var. neomexicana
intro: Draba aurea var. neomexicana, also known as New Mexico goldencress, is a rare and endangered perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States. It is a type of cruciferous plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. New Mexico goldencress can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in salves and topical creams for its medicinal benefits.
